svg.title: Verified CodeCoT Pipeline
svg.desc: Three-stage pipeline: concept-to-code synthesis, execution-based code verification, and trace-grounded bidirectional CoT generation.

text.tspan: LLM generates N code solutions and
All N×M pairs executed; pairs with
Traces ground every reasoning step to
Key guarantee: every CoT rationale is verified against real variable values, state transitions, and executed control-flow paths — not inferred from static code.
